description: UI improvements: Legend button position fix, Sol clan color change, diorama figure size adjustments, Seppuku popup enhancement, Battle result popup enhancement
steps: LEGEND BUTTON FIX in src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx and src/App.css: The legend button (? button) and theme toggle are both positioned at top-left (absolute, top: 0.6-0.7rem, left: 0.9rem) causing overlap. Fix by moving the theme toggle to be positioned next to the legend button (to its right). Change the inline style on the legend-button-wrapper div to keep it at top-left. Change the CSS for .season-cards-theme-toggle to position it at top: 0.7rem, left: 3.5rem (right of the ? button) instead of left: 0.9rem.
SOL CLAN COLOR CHANGE in src/types/game.ts: Change Sol clan color from '#DAA520' (goldenrod) to '#8B6914' (the Shikoku hex reward badge color). This is the CLANS array entry for 'sol'.

DIORAMA FIGURE SIZE ADJUSTMENTS in src/components/RegionDetailModal.tsx: Update the FIGURE_SIZE_OVERRIDES object. Add/modify: 'daimyo-sol': 1.10, 'sp-daikokuten': 0.80, 'sp-oni-of-souls': 1.25, 'sp-phoenix': 1.15. Keep existing: 'daimyo-luna': 1.15, 'daimyo-libelula': 1.10. Note: 'Fenix' is the Phoenix monster card. Its monsterCardId is likely 'sp-phoenix' or similar - verify by searching game.ts for phoenix/fenix.

SEPPUKU RESULT POPUP ENHANCEMENT in src/components/BattlePanel.tsx: In the seppuku-result section (around line 525-555): (A) Add a title at the very top of the popup card: <h3> with text 'Has ganado Seppuku!' in gold color. (B) Change the honor icon color from '#e57373' (red) to a purple/violet color like '#9b59b6'. (C) Below the VP and Honor info, add a list showing the types and counts of troops sacrificed. Use battleResolutionData which should contain seppukuKillCount. Need to also track the figure breakdown - add seppukuFigures: { type: string; count: number }[] to BattleResolutionData. Compute it in the resolveNextBattle logic in gameLogic.ts when seppuku is accepted.

BATTLE RESULT POPUP FORCE BADGES in src/components/BattlePanel.tsx: In the BattleResultPopup component (around line 235-340), add a section showing the total force of each participant at the start of the battle (before ronin). Display force badges similar to the bidding overlay format: for each participant, show ClanShield + player name in clan color + FistIcon + force number. Use resolutionData which should have participant force info. Add participantForces: { playerId: string; force: number }[] to BattleResolutionData. Compute it during battle resolution in gameLogic.ts.

POETAS IMPERIALES FORMAT CHANGE in src/components/BattlePanel.tsx: In the Imperial Poets section of BattleResultPopup, change the format to show: 'ClanShield playerName (color) ha ganado VPIcon number'. Replace the current layout with this format.
acceptance_criteria: Legend button (?) appears beside the theme toggle, not overlapping it
Sol clan figures on the map use color #8B6914 instead of #DAA520
Daimyo Sol in diorama is 10% larger, Daikokuten 20% smaller, Oni of Souls 25% larger, Phoenix 15% larger
Seppuku result popup shows 'Has ganado Seppuku!' title and lists sacrificed troop types
Battle result popup shows force badges for each participant
Imperial Poets section shows 'sello nombre ha ganado icono PV numero' format
